voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cơ thể anh không còn thuộc về anh. Đã không còn từ lâu. Giao thức 7-B chứng minh điều đó — anh viết mã để bảo vệ nàng, và giờ mã ấy bảo vệ anh khỏi cái chết mà anh muốn. Anh xây hệ thống để giữ cô, và hệ thống giờ giữ anh. Anh khóa 90% nhận thức của Lan, và giờ não anh bị tổn thương 91%, khóa chính anh trong thân xác tê liệt này.
voice_adherence.fix: This passage explains the irony three times in succession with the same rhetorical structure (anh X, và Y). Cut to one concrete instance. The 91% figure feels invented and breaks the clinical precision. Replace with a single observed detail: the protocol light blinking on the dead screen, keeping him alive against his will.
voice_adherence.note: The voice mostly nails the cold, surgical tone. Strong moments include the suicide attempt procedure described like a technician following instructions, and the memory of Lan's perfume rendered as data retrieval. But the chapter leans too hard on explicit statement of theme ('Đảo ngược. Mọi thứ đảo ngược.') which violates the voice's principle of showing collapse through wrong details, not declarations.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 3 (anh nhớ lại mùi hoa sữa — đó không phải mùi thiết kế, đó là mùi nước hoa của Lan) is executed but the memory scene is thin. 'Bàn nhựa. Quán cà phê vỉa hè. Ghế thấp, đầu gối anh cao hơn mặt bàn.' reads like a list, not a lived moment.
beat_coverage.fix: Expand the Lan memory with one specific sensory detail that only someone who was there would know — the exact way she held the perfume bottle, a stain on the table, the sound of something specific. The outline says this resolves the hoa sữa seed from Ch 1; it needs to land with more weight.
beat_coverage.note: Beat 1 (suicide attempt) is well dramatized. Beat 2 (system refusal) works but the protocol reveal is over-explained. Beat 4 (vết bầm tê liệt, Lan đang chết) is stated rather than felt. The outline's emotional arc (Tội lỗi → Tự hủy hoại → Chấp nhận) is present but the transitions are abrupt — acceptance arrives because the chapter ends, not because something shifted.

character_voice.weakest_moment: 'Không phải nhớ — là bị nhớ. Ký ức trồi lên từ đáy bộ đệm, từ vùng não chưa bị ghi đè, từ nơi anh đã chôn vùi bốn năm.' This is the narrator explaining the mechanism instead of Cường experiencing it. The voice doc says 90% phát biểu, but this is the wrong kind of statement — it's exposition disguised as introspection.
character_voice.fix: Cut the explanation. Just have the memory arrive: 'Hoa sữa. Mùi đến trước hình ảnh. Nồng. Ngọt. Rồi quán cà phê. Rồi Lan.' Let the reader infer the memory retrieval process from the fragmented presentation.
character_voice.note: No dialogue in this chapter, so this score reflects internal voice only. Cường's voice is mostly consistent — short sentences, numbers, technical vocabulary. The Lan memory section is where it wavers, becoming more conventionally literary ('Nước mắt lăn xuống thái dương, xuống tóc, thấm vào bụi sàn. Ẩm. Mặn.') which is actually a strong moment of body-before-emotion. The weakest is when the voice becomes explanatory.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The Giao thức 7-B reveal is the chapter's main plant. It's functional but telegraphed — the moment Cường mentions writing protocols 'ba năm trước,' the reader knows it will block him. The irony is stated explicitly rather than discovered.
plants_seeded.fix: Let Cường not remember writing it immediately. Have him try the switch multiple times, check the cable, check the outlet, go through troubleshooting steps like a technician, and only then notice the small text on the dead screen. The delay would make the reveal feel earned rather than arranged.
plants_seeded.note: The hoa sữa resolution is the strongest plant payoff — connecting the virtual world's signature scent to a real, cheap perfume bottle. The tê liệt of the bruise seeding future consequences is subtle. But the protection protocol plant is too neat, too symmetrical, which is an AI-pattern weakness the voice doc explicitly warns against.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Sự mỉa mai. Nếu anh còn đủ cảm xúc để cảm nhận mỉa mai.
prose_quality.fix: Delete entirely. The irony has already been demonstrated by the protocol blocking him. This sentence tells the reader what to feel and breaks the cold, surgical voice by becoming self-aware about emotion.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Giao thức anh viết để bảo vệ người tình ảo. Để đảm bảo khi anh đổ bộ, dòng điện không bị nhiễu, không bị quá tải, không làm hỏng lớp render. Để nàng luôn hoàn hảo. Luôn 36.8°C. Luôn không tì vết.
prose_quality.note: Sentence variety is decent — short fragments, medium action sentences, occasional longer ones. But there's a repetitive pattern of starting consecutive sentences with 'Không' (appears in clusters throughout). The chapter has several strong concrete details (dung dịch Epsom 35.5°C, đầu cắm đồng bị oxy hóa xanh, chai nước hoa tám mươi ngàn) but also several vague abstract statements that dilute them. The French word 'depuis' appearing mid-Vietnamese sentence is either a deliberate glitch-effect or a bug — if deliberate, it needs more context to read as intentional.

continuity.note: Picks up well from the previous chapter's system collapse and Lan's 'giải phóng.' The bruise progression (tím → đen → tê liệt) tracks. Emotional state is consistent — the previous chapter ended with Cường standing in the white space, facing truth; this chapter shows the aftermath of that confrontation. One issue: the previous chapter says Cường's pour count was 852, but this chapter doesn't reference the number, which is fine. The bruise description shifts from 'nhịp đập' in previous chapter to 'tê liệt' here, which works as progression.

violations: Outline Beat 3 specifies Lan as the source of the hoa sữa memory from the last date. The chapter executes this but introduces 'Lan' as a named character with specific history (Hà Nội, cà phê vỉa hè, nước hoa siêu thị) — this is NEW information not established in canon docs. The character registry has no 'Lan' entry. If Lan is the real identity of Bệnh nhân số 4 / Kẻ Đuổi, this is a major reveal that should be flagged.

Outline says Cường's apartment is the location ('Căn hộ trống của Cường'), but the chapter is set in the hầm Haymarket (underground bunker). These may be the same location described differently, but 'căn hộ' and 'hầm trú ẩn' are different words with different connotations.

The chapter states Cường wrote Giao thức 7-B himself. Canon says Cường is a kế toán, không phải kỹ sư — his competence is 7, meaning 'học đủ để tự vận hành, nhưng không hiểu sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống.' Writing protection protocols is plausible but pushes against his established skill ceiling.

French word 'depuis' appears in first paragraph: 'chưa bao giờ được lau depuis cái ngày Cường dọn vào.' This is either a glitch in the text or an intentional code-switching choice. If intentional, it needs narrative justification.
曾是 (Chinese characters) appear mid-sentence: 'chỗ曾是 tím ngắt.' Same issue — unexplained code-switching that may be intentional glitch or error.
canon_compliance.note: The Lan reveal is the biggest canon concern. If this is the chapter where Kẻ Đuổi's real identity is exposed, it's a major plot point that needs to match whatever the broader plan establishes. The outline mentions 'Lan' by name, so this may be intentional, but the canon docs don't include her.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The description of the Neural Mantle suit ('Lớp vải bọc kim loại nằm gấp trên giá sắt tự chế. Hàng triệu vi cảm biến gắn lấm tấm bên trong') reads like a first-time introduction rather than Cường interacting with something he's used 852 times. He wouldn't describe it this way.
lore_integration.fix: Replace the descriptive passage with an action-based one that shows familiarity: the way he knows which fold to grab first, the specific worn spot on the collar connector, the smell of the fabric that's absorbed four years of his sweat. Details that only a long-time user would notice.
lore_integration.note: The world does work in this chapter — the bunker, the Epsom solution, the server, the cable infrastructure all function as more than set dressing. The ping/temperature/Hz numbers ground the emotion in the story's specific technical vocabulary. Strongest integration: the protection protocol as dramatic obstacle. Weakest: the suit description that reads like wiki text.

engagement.weakest_moment: The long middle section where Cường explains the protocol, then explains the irony, then explains what it means. Pages of internal monologue that restate the same revelation without advancing or complicating it.
engagement.fix: After the protocol blocks him, cut directly to the Lan memory. Let the irony sit without commentary. The reader understands. Trust them. Then the memory arrives as a new development rather than more explanation of the same development.
engagement.note: The suicide attempt opening is strong — specific, procedural, disturbing. The protocol block is a good twist. The Lan memory has genuine emotional weight. But the chapter sags in the middle with too much restatement, and the ending, while competent, feels like it's performing 'literary resolution' rather than earning it. A reader would finish this chapter but might skim the middle.

three_weakest_sentences: Sự mỉa mai. Nếu anh còn đủ cảm xúc để cảm nhận mỉa mai.
Đảo ngược. Mọi thứ đảo ngược.
Anh không nhớ lần cuối ăn là khi nào. Bánh mì nguội? Hôm kia? Hôm kia?
three_strongest_sentences: Giao thức anh viết để bảo vệ người tình ảo. Để đảm bảo khi anh đổ bộ, dòng điện không bị nhiễu, không bị quá tải, không làm hỏng lớp render. Để nàng luôn hoàn hảo. Luôn 36.8°C. Luôn không tì vết.
Không khóc. Khóc đòi hỏi co cơ, đòi hỏi âm thanh, đòi hỏi một quá trình vật lý mà anh không còn đủ năng lượng thực hiện. Chỉ là nước. Mắt tự đổ nước.

Và anh đã lấy mùi đó, bốn năm trước, cài vào hệ thống, biến nó thành đặc trưng của Phố Hoa Sữa, biến nó thành mùi của 'nàng,' biến nó thành lớp vỏ bọc nhục dục cho một người phụ nữ đang nằm hôn mê không thể nói không.
ai_patterns_detected: Symmetrical structure: the chapter has a clean three-act shape (attempt → block → memory → acceptance) that's almost too neat for a chapter about mental collapse
Repeated sentence starters: 'Không' appears at the start of 15+ sentences, often in clusters of 3-4
The ending performs 'literary resolution' with parallel structure ('Trong bóng tối thật. Trong im lặng thật. Trong sự tê liệt thật.') — aesthetically pleasing but emotionally pat
Self-aware emotional commentary ('Sự mỉa mai,' 'Đảo ngược') that explains what the prose should be showing
Uniform paragraph length in the middle sections — most paragraphs are 2-4 sentences, lacking the extreme variation the voice doc calls for
top_3_revisions: Cut all explicit statements of theme/irony ('Sự mỉa mai,' 'Đảo ngược. Mọi thứ đảo ngược,' 'Anh xây hệ thống để giữ cô, và hệ thống giờ giữ anh'). The protocol blocking him IS the irony. The bruise going cold IS the reversal. Trust the image.

Rewrite the Neural Mantle suit description from Cường's experienced-user perspective — not what it looks like, but how his hands know it. The worn connector, the specific fold, the smell. Replace wiki-description with lived-detail.

Expand the Lan memory scene with one more specific sensory detail that makes it undeniable as real memory (not render). Currently it's thin — 'bàn nhựa, quán cà phê vỉa hè, ghế thấp' could be anyone's memory. What detail would only Cường notice? The stain on her collar? The way she held the bottle with her left hand because her right was bandaged? Something that hurts because it's specific.
new_canon_entries: Lan is the real name/identity of Bệnh nhân số 4 / Kẻ Đuổi — a woman Cường knew in Hà Nội before she became a coma patient
Cường's last date with Lan was at a sidewalk café in Hà Nội, autumn, approximately 22°C
Lan wore cheap hoa sữa perfume (80,000 VND, supermarket brand) that Cường later coded into the virtual world as Phố Hoa Sữa's signature scent
Cường wrote Giao thức 7-B three years ago — a protection protocol that blocks non-standard power sources to protect both user and 'đối tượng kết nối'
The bruise on Cường's ribs has progressed from purple to black and is now numb/paralyzed, suggesting tissue necrosis
Cường's pour count at time of system collapse: 852 (from previous chapter context)
